name: cloudlab-host-downloader
description: Firefox extension that downloads CloudLab experiment SSH targets as user@hostname lines.

scripts.build: npx --yes web-ext@latest build --source-dir . --artifacts-dir dist --overwrite-dest --ignore-files package.json test test/** dist
scripts.lint:extension: npx --yes web-ext@latest lint --source-dir . --ignore-files package.json test test/** dist
